name: Countly Mobile Analytics API
what_it_does: Open-source mobile and web analytics platform with REST API — tracking user sessions, events, crashes, and retention across iOS, Android, and web with GDPR-compliant self-hosted deployment option for full data ownership.
use_cases: Tracking mobile app events, sessions, and crashes with self-hosted deployment for privacy
Querying user analytics data (DAU, retention, funnels) via management API for dashboards
Sending push notifications to segmented user groups via Countly Push API
Managing custom events and user profiles programmatically via REST API
Running A/B tests and feature flags for mobile apps via Countly RemoteConfig API
not_for: Pure web analytics without mobile app focus (use Matomo or Plausible)
Enterprise product analytics with advanced SQL queries (use Heap or Amplitude)
Teams without infrastructure to self-host and maintain the analytics platform
best_when: A privacy-conscious mobile app team needs self-hosted analytics with full data ownership, GDPR compliance, and open-source flexibility.
avoid_when: You need enterprise product analytics, advanced cohort analysis, or a fully managed platform without operational overhead.

auth.notes: App key for data ingestion (mobile SDK). Management API key for administrative operations. Global vs app-specific key scoping. Self-hosted — key management is operator responsibility. Cloud version uses account-based tokens.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Community Edition: completely free, unlimited data (self-hosted)
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise Edition from $299/month; Cloud from $149/month for 100K MAU
pricing.notes: AGPL v3 open source Community Edition — free to self-host. Enterprise Edition adds advanced features (attribution, A/B testing). Finnish company (Helsinki). Strong privacy and GDPR focus. 15+ year history. SDKs for 20+ platforms.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits — self-hosted; limited by server hardware

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Management REST API for querying analytics data, managing users, and app configuration. Write API for event ingestion. SDKs abstract HTTP API for mobile platforms. Self-hosted gives full API control. Documentation adequate for common use cases.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Event writes create new events — use deduplication logic. Management queries idempotent. User profile updates idempotent for same UID.
known_agent_gotchas: Management API requires server-side app key — different from write API key
Self-hosted requires MongoDB and Redis — non-trivial infrastructure
Advanced features (A/B testing, attribution) only in Enterprise Edition
AGPL license — check compatibility with commercial product distribution

security_score_components.security_notes: AGPL open source — auditable. GDPR compliant — Finnish company with strong EU privacy culture. Self-hosted gives full data control. TLS configurable (not default on self-hosted). App key vs management key separation. No formal cloud certifications on Community Edition.
